issue_body:
### Problem area

Action fails to run / exits with an error

### Action version

@main

### AI provider

openrouter

### Trigger event

workflow_dispatch

### Expected behaviour

The action should run without error.

### Actual behaviour

The following error appeared:

file:///action/src/inputs.js:14
  DEFAULT_ASSIGNMENT_CONTEXT_MAX_CHARS,
  ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
SyntaxError: The requested module './constants.js' does not provide an export named 'DEFAULT_ASSIGNMENT_CONTEXT_MAX_CHARS'
    at #asyncInstantiate (node:internal/modules/esm/module_job:327:21)
    at async ModuleJob.run (node:internal/modules/esm/module_job:431:5)
    at async node:internal/modules/esm/loader:636:26
    at async asyncRunEntryPointWithESMLoader (node:internal/modules/run_main:101:5)

### Relevant workflow snippet

```yaml
n/a
```

### Actions run log

```text

```

### Has this ever worked?

Yes — it worked before and recently broke
